name: TAKE TWO INTERACTIVE SOFTWARE INC
summary: Take-Two Interactive Software is a leading developer, publisher, and marketer of interactive entertainment globally. The company develops, operates, and publishes products through Rockstar Games, 2K, and Zynga labels. Key franchises include Grand Theft Auto (445M+ units sold), Red Dead Redemption 2 (70M+ units), and NBA 2K. Products span console, PC, and mobile platforms, with revenue from game sales, in-game purchases, virtual currency, live services, and advertising.
